Brittany uses 1/4 ounce of shampoo every other day. This means she uses 1/2 ounce per day. Over the course of a leap year, which has 366 days, she will use 1/2 ounce × 366 = 183 ounces of shampoo. She buys shampoo in 14-ounce bottles, so she needs to calculate how many bottles are required to cover 183 ounces.

She needs to determine how many 14-ounce bottles are needed to cover 183 ounces of shampoo. Since 14 × 13 = 182, she would need 14 bottles to cover 182 ounces, and one additional bottle for the remaining 1 ounce. Therefore, she needs 15 bottles to get through a leap year.
